name: Diamond Slimehound
description:
Continuing the series with another (debatably very conceptually interesting yet design wise very bland) slimehound we have diamond!

disclaimer:

Yes i drew the thumbnail art however it's essentially a from eye copy of this art from 0'13 gato that draws, that being this beautiful art.

A goobly creature that is just completely untrusting because- lets be honest diamonds get hunted, a LOT.

Hope y'all enjoy and sorry for my absence (I've started sm other stuffs :>)

Verbose decription teaser:

Diamond slimehound is a classic example of a false monster needing to be understood to understand the distrust behind their actions and past of harm. They are incredibly untruthful of humans due to their past of being hunted for their body's highly desirable qualities (crystalline material composition similar to false-diamond with bend). They have the ability to manipulate their form lightly. They can alter their body shape drastically with their crystalline goo. This can range between forming enormous sharp claws that extend further than any talons, making a bigger tail or paws for balance, changing their face shape a bit, sprouting wings (this is very hard and pushing their abilities), enlarging their muscles for strength and even growing in size by taking goo mass out of their tail and redistributing it.
creator: Frostlith
